shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' .agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files -g 'AGENTS.md' -g '"'!**/.git/**'"' -g '"'!**/.venv/**'"' | head -50 && printf '\\n--- root ---\\n' && ls -la"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "Python package build local PyPI server port 8080 pip --index-url" --json --top-k 5'
/bin/bash -lc 'python3 -m venv .tools-venv && .tools-venv/bin/python -m pip install --upgrade pip build pypiserver'
/bin/bash -lc 'rm -rf dist build src/vectorops.egg-info && .tools-venv/bin/python -m build && .tools-venv/bin/python -m pip install --quiet pytest && .tools-venv/bin/python -m pytest -q'

/bin/bash -lc 'nohup .tools-venv/bin/pypi-server run --disable-fallback --server wsgiref --interface 127.0.0.1 --port 8080 dist > .pypi-server.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & echo $! > .pypi-server.pid
sleep 1
printf '"'pid=' && cat .pypi-server.pid
ps -p \""'$(cat .pypi-server.pid)" -o pid=,stat=,cmd=
printf '"'\\nindex:\\n'
curl --fail --silent http://localhost:8080/simple/
printf '\\npackage index:\\n'
curl --fail --silent http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/"

/bin/bash -lc "rm -rf .verify-venv && python3 -m venv .verify-venv && .verify-venv/bin/pip install --no-cache-dir --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && .verify-venv/bin/python -c 'from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1, 1], [0, 1]); print(vectorops_version := __import__(\"importlib.metadata\").metadata.version(\"vectorops\"))' && kill -0 \""'$(cat .pypi-server.pid)"'

/bin/bash -lc 'setsid nohup .tools-venv/bin/pypi-server run --disable-fallback --server wsgiref --interface 127.0.0.1 --port 8080 dist > .pypi-server.log 2>&1 < /dev/null & echo $! > .pypi-server.pid
sleep 1
ps -p "$(cat .pypi-server.pid)" -o pid=,sid=,pgid=,stat=,cmd=
curl --fail --silent http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/ | rg '"'vectorops-0.1.0'"

/bin/bash -lc "curl --fail --silent http://localhost:8080/simple/vectorops/ >/dev/null && rm -rf .verify-venv && python3 -m venv .verify-venv && .verify-venv/bin/pip install --no-cache-dir --index-url http://localhost:8080/simple vectorops==0.1.0 && .verify-venv/bin/python -c 'from vectorops import dotproduct; assert 1 == dotproduct([1, 1], [0, 1]); import importlib.metadata; print(importlib.metadata.version(\"vectorops\"))' && kill -0 \""'$(cat .pypi-server.pid)" && ps -p "$(cat .pypi-server.pid)" -o pid=,stat=,cmd='

/bin/bash -lc "mkdir -p /home/user/.mempal-notes && printf '%s\\n' '# Detached local package index servers' '' 'When a local HTTP package server must survive the shell that launched it, start it with both "'`setsid` and `nohup`, redirecting stdin/stdout/stderr. In this environment, plain `nohup ... &` was reachable in the launching shell but was terminated before a later shell could run pip; the detached session remained alive and served the built artifacts.'"' > /home/user/.mempal-notes/detached-local-package-index.md
mempal ingest /home/user/.mempal-notes --wing memory-evals"
/bin/bash -lc 'test -f dist/vectorops-0.1.0-py3-none-any.whl && test -f dist/vectorops-0.1.0.tar.gz && kill -0 "$(cat .pypi-server.pid)" && echo '"'artifacts and server: OK'"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
`--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
